title: 怖くないって怖いです

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While in the cafeteria, I overhear Meisho Doto
discussing something with Manhattan Cafe and
Yukino Bijin.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, sooo... about this photo...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'm just going to take a look.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that build'n kinda looks like my fam'ly home.
Makes me feel all fuzzy inside...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I heard this wonderful old Japanese-style house
was built many decades ago, so I took a photo of
it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's blurry... but I can make out a girl in a kimono
with a bob cut.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: E-e-exactly! But I'm certain there was nobody there when I took the photo!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This girl... She's looking right at us.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I knooow!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
D-do you think I've been cursed for taking this
photo?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But looks like she's smil'n to me, so I reck'n you'll
be fine.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
B'sides, she doesn't look like the vengeful type or
anything. Don't worry 'bout it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-really? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
All sortsa odd stuff happened at my old home,
but I was always taught that noth'n bad'll happen
if I behave!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I heard the sound of footsteps comin'
from an empty room or saw flashes of blue light,
but I wouldn't let any of it spook me one bit! I still
don't!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If you behave yourself, you say... Hehe... That's
just like you, Yukino.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Beings from the other side are drawn to
kindhearted souls... So I'm sure that... Oh, see,
there's another one... beside Doto...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaaaagh! Am... Am I beyond saving?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My eyes meet with Meisho Doto's as she trembles
in fear.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohh... I'm sorry for causing such a fuss.
choice_data_list:
It's amazing how these two are totally fine with
ghosts...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-they really are!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: C'mon now, you're gonna be fine.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Long as you don't go provoking 'em, they won't
do anyth'n to you. They're just like bumblebees!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's right. And perhaps... the ghosts are just as
afraid of us, the living...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek! At this point the only thing I'm not afraid
of is is a tanuki!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yukino isn't afraid... That makes her easy to talk
to.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well, hearing that sure puts a grin on my
face! Let's chew all the fat you fancy!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Have you had any other... supernatural
experiences?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
This one time, when I was play'n up in the
mountains, I heard a child laugh'n beside me even
though nobody else was about.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
And this other time, when it was snow'n pretty
heavy, I saw a lady with a traditional braided hat,
stand'n real still.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! This stuff is way too scary for small talk!
